steps.title: Convert square feet
steps.content: Because area is two-dimensional, square the linear conversion. Since $1$ meter equals $3.28$ feet, one square meter equals this many square feet: $$1\text{ m}^2=(3.28)^2\text{ ft}^2=10.7584\text{ ft}^2$$

steps.title: Convert the time rate
steps.content: Convert square feet to square meters and hours to minutes. Dividing by $10.7584$ changes the area units, and dividing by $60$ changes hours to minutes: $$330\cdot \frac{1}{10.7584}\cdot \frac{1}{60}=0.5112$$ This is closest to $0.51$ square meters per minute. The answer is A.
